## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] My contribution uses [AI tools approved for use by Velir](https://velir.atlassian.net/wiki/x/mIAhJQE).
- [ ] My contribution adds a new instruction, prompt, agent, skill, or workflow file in the correct directory.
- [ ] The file follows the required naming convention.
- [ ] The content is clearly structured and follows the example format.
- [ ] I have tested my instructions, prompt, agent, skill, or workflow with GitHub Copilot.
- [ ] I have added my contribution to the appropriate `README.md` file.
- [ ] My contribution does not require a paid service that we do not already use.

## Type of Contribution

- [ ] New instruction file.
- [ ] New prompt file.
- [ ] New agent file.
- [ ] New plugin.
- [ ] New skill file.
- [ ] New agentic workflow.
- [ ] Update to existing instruction, prompt, agent, plugin, skill, or workflow.
